scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter scorpio.di run build && pnpm --filter scorpio.ai run build && pnpm --filter sbot.commons run build && pnpm --filter channel.base run build && pnpm --filter channel.lark run build && pnpm --filter channel.slack run build && pnpm --filter channel.wecom run build && pnpm --filter channel.wechat run build
scripts.build: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run build && pnpm --filter sbot-cli run build
scripts.prebuild:sbot: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter sbot-admin run build
scripts.debug:sbot: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run debug
scripts.publish:sbot: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot publish --no-git-checks --access public
scripts.link:sbot: pnpm run prebuild:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run build && npm link packages/sbot/dist
scripts.debug:admin: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-admin run debug
scripts.build:vscode: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter sbot-vscode run build
scripts.install:vscode: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter sbot-vscode run install-ext
scripts.build:pwa: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/pwa run build
scripts.debug:pwa: pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/pwa run dev
scripts.debug:cli: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-cli run debug
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-cli publish --no-git-checks
scripts.docker:build: pnpm run build && node packages/sbot/scripts/docker.js build
scripts.docker:publish: pnpm run docker:build && node packages/sbot/scripts/docker.js publish
scripts.docker: pnpm run docker:build && pnpm run docker:save
